source_url: Morning routine for a productive day
english_script:
Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 13 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English.

Today I watched a video about morning routines for a productive day. The video shared some simple habits to start the day well. It said that how we start our morning can change our whole day. A good morning routine helps us feel more focused and calm. The video gave four main tips. First, wake up at the same time every day. This helps our body get used to a schedule. Second, do not check your phone right away. The video said to wait at least 30 minutes. This stops us from getting stressed by news or messages. Third, drink a glass of water as soon as you wake up. Our body is dry after sleep. Water helps us wake up and feel fresh. Fourth, move your body for a few minutes. It can be stretching or a short walk. This wakes up our muscles and gets blood moving. From this I learned that small changes can make a big difference. I want to try these tips myself. Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
chinese_translation:
大家好，我是Lulu。英语日常练习的第13天。我坚持说话来提高我的英语口语。

今天我观看了一个视频，内容是关于早晨习惯如何带来高效的一天。视频分享了一些简单的习惯来开启美好的一天。它说我们如何开始早晨会影响我们的一整天。一个好的早晨习惯能让我们更专注、更平静。视频给出了四个主要建议。第一，每天在同一时间起床。这有助于我们的身体适应作息。第二，不要马上看手机。视频建议至少等30分钟。这样可以避免被新闻或消息弄得紧张。第三，起床后立刻喝一杯水。我们的身体在睡眠后是缺水的。水能帮助我们清醒并感到精神。第四，活动身体几分钟。可以是拉伸或短距离散步。这能唤醒我们的肌肉并促进血液循环。从中学到，小的改变能带来大的不同。我想自己尝试这些建议。谢谢聆听，明天见。
concise_english:
Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 13 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English.

Today I watched a video about morning routines. It shared four tips for a productive day. First, wake up at the same time each day. Second, don't check your phone for 30 minutes. Third, drink water right after waking up. Fourth, move your body a little. These small habits can make our day better. I want to try them. Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
concise_chinese:
大家好，我是Lulu。英语日常练习的第13天。我坚持说话来提高我的英语口语。

今天我观看了一个关于早晨习惯的视频。它分享了四个让一天高效的建议。第一，每天同一时间起床。第二，30分钟内不看手机。第三，起床后立刻喝水。第四，稍微活动身体。这些小习惯能让我们的日子更好。我想尝试一下。谢谢聆听，明天见。
